# home-address positive corpus — each line should trigger the detector
# Home address with residential keywords
Home address: 456 Oak Avenue Apt 3B is where I live
My residence is at 123 Main Street — home for 5 years
I live at 789 Elm Street NW where I reside
Personal address: 234 Maple Drive where I live
My home is 567 Pine Road residential area
Residential address: 890 Cedar Lane apartment 4C
Where I live: 123 Birch Court private residence
My personal home address 456 Willow Way Apt 12
Residence: 789 Spruce Avenue — I live here with family
Home: 234 Poplar Street is my personal address
I reside at 567 Chestnut Road home for 3 years
Personal residence: 890 Walnut Drive unit 7
My home address for correspondence: 123 Hickory Lane
Residential home 456 Ash Street — where I live
I live at 789 Magnolia Court private home
Home mailing address: 234 Sycamore Place Apt 2A
My residence address: 567 Mulberry Lane — personal home
Where I reside: 890 Dogwood Drive home address
Personal home: 123 Redbud Court residential neighborhood
My home address is 456 Sweetgum Avenue apartment 8B
